hero_body: One app for every bank, wallet, and brokerage across Asia. Finn AI surfaces what your money should be doing — before you have to ask.
hero_demo_finn_msg: NT$85K in 玉山 earns 0.1% APY. Moving to 將來銀行 earns 2.3% — that's S$520 extra this year.
features_sub: Built for how money actually works across Asia — fragmented, multi-currency, and always in motion.
features_card_unified_desc: Every bank, wallet, brokerage, and card across 8 markets in one interface. No more tab-switching between DBS, 玉山, and GrabPay.
features_card_insurance_desc: AI scans your income, dependents, and existing coverage across FWD, AIA, and Prudential to find where you're exposed.
features_card_cashflow_desc: Finn models your spending patterns across currencies and warns you before overspend — not after.
features_card_transfer_desc: Real-time comparison of cross-border rails. Finn tells you the cheapest way to move SGD→TWD today, not yesterday.
features_card_tax_desc: Jurisdiction-aware tax optimization for Singapore, Taiwan, Indonesia, Thailand — generated automatically each quarter.
features_card_b2b_desc: White-label Finn for neobanks and credit unions. Your customers get AI insights without you building the engine.
finn_body: Finn reads across every connected account — banks, wallets, brokerages, insurance — and surfaces insights no single app can see. Like a financially-savvy friend with read access to everything.
finn_feature_xborder_desc: Optimizes transfers across SGD, TWD, IDR, THB and 4 more currencies in real-time
finn_feature_alerts_desc: Warns you before you overspend, not after
finn_feature_nudges_desc: Finds idle cash and shows you exactly where it could work harder
finn_chat_placeholder: Ask Finn anything about your finances…
finn_conv_user_1: How much did I spend on dining across all my accounts last month?
finn_conv_finn_1: Across your DBS, 玉山, and GrabPay accounts, you spent S$1,240 on dining in March — that's 28% above your 3-month average. Most of it was in Taipei (NT$18,400 via 街口支付).
finn_conv_user_2: Am I on track for this month?
finn_conv_finn_2: You're 12 days in and already at S$680. At this pace, you'll hit ~S$1,700 by month end. I'd suggest setting a S$900 cap — want me to set up alerts across all your payment methods?
finn_conv_user_3: Yes, and what about my idle cash?
finn_conv_finn_3:
You have S$8,200 in DBS Savings (0.05% APY) and NT$85,000 in 玉山 (0.1%). I found 3 better options:

• 將來銀行 6-mo fixed: 2.3% APY
• StashAway Simple: 3.8% projected
• Syfe Cash+: 3.7% with instant withdrawal

Want me to model each scenario?
markets_sub: Connected to 30+ banks, wallets, and brokerages across Southeast and East Asia.
pricing_sub: Join early. Be first when Finn goes live.
pricing_free_desc: Get started with basic account linking
pricing_plus_desc: Full Finn AI and cross-border tools
footer_tagline: Your AI financial co-pilot for the new Asia. Headquartered in Singapore, serving 8 markets.
cta_body: Be among the first to experience smarter money across Asia.
